mapper.sql: rorder_no, rorder_item, customerNo, customerName, province, city, region, postcode, address, contactPsn, telNo, idCard, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_order_delivery
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_order_delivery (rorder_no, rorder_item, customerNo, customerName, province, city, region, postcode, address, contactPsn, telNo, idCard, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user) values (#{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customername,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

insert into dbo.ops_order_delivery
rorder_no,
rorder_item,
customerNo,
customerName,
province,
city,
region,
postcode,
address,
contactPsn,
telNo,
idCard,
create_time,
create_user,
update_time,
update_user,

#{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_order_delivery
rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerName = #{record.customername,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
province = #{record.province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{record.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
region = #{record.region,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
postcode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{record.address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
contactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
telNo = #{record.telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
idCard = #{record.idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_order_delivery set rorder_no = #{record.rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rorder_item = #{record.rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerName = #{record.customername,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, province = #{record.province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{record.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, region = #{record.region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, postcode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{record.address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, contactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, telNo = #{record.telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, idCard = #{record.idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_order_delivery
customerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerName = #{customername,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
region = #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
postcode = #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
contactPsn = #{contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
telNo = #{telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
idCard = #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and rorder_item = #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.ops_order_delivery set customerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerName = #{customername,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, region = #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, postcode = #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, contactPsn = #{contactpsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, telNo = #{telno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, idCard = #{idcard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} where rorder_no = #{rorderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and rorder_item = #{rorderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}
